```{r, calculate effects on seed production}
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "FPP.NflowT1"),]$Std.Estimate * FPP_Direct +
    # Path over Total Pollinators
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "TotalPollinators.NflowT1"),]$Std.Estimate * Total_Poll_Direct
  NFT1_Total <- NFT1_Direct + NFT1_Indirect
  
  # Height T1
  HT1_Direct <- 0
  HT1_Indirect <- 
    # Path over Height  T2
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "HeightT2.HeightT1"),]$Std.Estimate * HT2_Total + 
    # Path over Width T2 
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "WidthT2.HeightT1"),]$Std.Estimate * WT2_Total +
    # Path over FPP
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "FPP.HeightT1"),]$Std.Estimate * FPP_Direct +
    # Path over Total Pollinators
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "TotalPollinators.HeightT1"),]$Std.Estimate * Total_Poll_Direct  
  
  HT1_Total <- HT1_Direct + HT1_Indirect
  
  
  # Sow To Flower
  
  STF_Direct <- 0
  STF_Indirect <- 
    # Path over Height  T2
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "HeightT2.Sow_To_Flower"),]$Std.Estimate * HT2_Total +
    # Path over Width  T2
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "WidthT2.Sow_To_Flower"),]$Std.Estimate * WT2_Total +
    # Path over N Flowers  T2
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "NflowT2.Sow_To_Flower"),]$Std.Estimate * NFT2_Total +
    # Path over Height  T1
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "HeightT1.Sow_To_Flower"),]$Std.Estimate * HT1_Total +
    # Path over N Flowers  T1
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "NflowT1.Sow_To_Flower"),]$Std.Estimate * NFT1_Total +
    # Path over FPP
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "FPP.Sow_To_Flower"),]$Std.Estimate * FPP_Direct +
    # Path over Total Pollinators
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "TotalPollinators.Sow_To_Flower"),]$Std.Estimate * Total_Poll_Direct
  
  STF_Total <- STF_Direct + STF_Indirect
  
  
  # Width T1
  WT1_Direct <- 0
  WT1_Indirect <- 
    # Path over Height T1
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "HeightT1.WidthT1"),]$Std.Estimate * HT1_Total +
    # Path over N Flowers T1
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "NflowT1.WidthT1"),]$Std.Estimate * NFT1_Total +
    # Path over N Flowers T2
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "NflowT2.WidthT1"),]$Std.Estimate * NFT2_Total +
    # Path over Width T2
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "WidthT2.WidthT1"),]$Std.Estimate * WT2_Total +
    # Path over Sow to Flower
    Path_Data[which(Path_Data$Pathway == "Sow_To_Flower.WidthT1"),]$Std.Estimate * STF_Total

  WT1_Total <- WT1_Direct + WT1_Indirect
  
  Path_Effects <- as.data.frame(rbind(WT1_Total,
                                      STF_Total,
                                      HT1_Total,
                                      NFT1_Total,
                                      WT2_Total,
                                      HT2_Total,
                                      NFT2_Total,
                                      FPP_Total,
                                      Total_Poll_Total))
  
  colnames(Path_Effects) <- Treatmen_Levels[i]
  
  All_Effects <- cbind(All_Effects,Path_Effects)
  
}

```

## 3.3 Plot effects in heatmap

```{r, Heatmap}

Stacked_Effects <- data.frame("Treatment" = as.data.frame(stack(All_Effects))$ind,
                              "Path" = c("SowToFlower","WidthT1","HeightT1","NFlowersT1",
                                         "WidthT2","HeightT2","NFlowersT2","FPP","Total_Poll_Total"),
                              "TotalEffect" = as.data.frame(stack(All_Effects))$values)


Stacked_Effects$Path <- factor(Stacked_Effects$Path, 
                               levels = c("SowToFlower","WidthT1","HeightT1","NFlowersT1",
                                          "WidthT2","HeightT2","NFlowersT2","FPP","Total_Poll_Total"))

Stacked_Effects$Treatment <- factor(Stacked_Effects$Treatment, 
                               levels = c("C", "HC", "BSF", "MW", "CHT", "OF"))


ggplot(data = Stacked_Effects, aes(x = Treatment, y = Path, fill = TotalEffect)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = format(round(TotalEffect,2), nsmall = 2))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name = "Effect on seed set",
                       low = "#A51122",
                       mid = "#FFFFFF",
                       high = "#006228",
                       limits = c(-1, 1), 
                       breaks = seq(-1,1,by=0.25)) + 
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c("SowToFlower" = "Time until flowering",
                              "WidthT1" = "Width T1",
                              "HeightT1" = "Heigh T1",
                              "NFlowersT1" = "Number of flowers T1", 
                              "WidthT2" = "Width T2",
                              "HeightT2" = "Heigh T2",
                              "NFlowersT2" = "Number of flowers T2",
                              "FPP" = "Flowers visited per pollinator",
                              "Total_Poll_Total" = "Total number of pollinators")) +
  labs(y = " ") +
  CustomPlot
```
